title: murtughas
intro: Murtughas is a type of plant, scientifically known as Sida cordifolia, commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties. This plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its numerous health benefits. The health benefits of Murtughas include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Murtughas is typically prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, capsules, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
